name: frontend-stack-defaults
intent: Establish shadcn/ui and Tailwind CSS as the default frontend technology stack for all platform development. This includes: (1) Discovery skill guidance for frontend projects, (2) Demo app using these libraries as reference implementation, (3) Code generation templates using these patterns, (4) Component library patterns for consistency.

indicators: No external API calls - pure convention/tooling
Provides foundation for all frontend features
Already partially implemented in skills and web app
uncertainties: Should code generation templates be included in scope?
What shadcn components should be pre-installed vs on-demand?
